name: Fettuccine with Tomato-Avocado Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Fresh hot chile pepper; seeded and minced
2 medium Ripe avocados; peeled, stone removed and cut into 3/4″ cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onion, garlic, and chile pepper; cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the tomatoes, salt, and pepper; stir often until the sauce has thickened slightly, about 10 minutes.
4. Remove from the heat and stir in the cilantro. Keep warm.
5. In a large saucepan of lightly salted boiling water, cook the noodles until just tender, about 8 minutes. Drain well and transfer to a warmed serving bowl.
6. Add the tomato sauce, avocados, extra-virgin olive oil, and lime juice; toss to mix well.
7. Serve immediately.
